entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency trading platform associated with the WOO ecosystem. After a contained July 2025 unauthorized-withdrawal incident affecting nine accounts, FusionX Digital agreed in October 2025 to acquire and become the new operator of WOO X while user accounts, assets, trading, and support continued without interruption.
entity.notes: Do not mark dead. The July 2025 incident was contained and compensated, and the October 2025 operator acquisition was presented as continuity of WOO X rather than shutdown or rebrand.

expected.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency trading platform associated with WOO Network. In July 2025 it reported a contained incident in which nine user accounts suffered unauthorized withdrawals totaling about USD 14 million; withdrawals were temporarily paused and the exchange said affected users would be fully covered.
expected.notes: Do not mark dead. The July 2025 incident caused unauthorized withdrawals and a temporary withdrawal pause, but available evidence describes a contained incident, full compensation, and continued trading rather than a terminal shutdown.

changes.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency trading platform associated with the WOO ecosystem. After a contained July 2025 unauthorized-withdrawal incident affecting nine accounts, FusionX Digital agreed in October 2025 to acquire and become the new operator of WOO X while user accounts, assets, trading, and support continued without interruption.
changes.notes: Do not mark dead. The July 2025 incident was contained and compensated, and the October 2025 operator acquisition was presented as continuity of WOO X rather than shutdown or rebrand.

events.title: FusionX Digital agreed to acquire and operate WOO X
events.description: WOO announced a strategic partnership under which FusionX Digital would acquire the centralized exchange WOO X and become its new operator, with accounts, assets, trading, and support remaining uninterrupted.
events.notes: The acquisition changed the operator while preserving platform continuity.

evidence.title: FusionX Digital to become the new operator of WOO X
evidence.notes: First-party announcement of the acquisition and operator transition, explicitly stating that user services would remain uninterrupted.

evidence.title: WOO X official trading platform
evidence.notes: Current official domain confirming continued exchange operation.
